description_long: This handcart features a rectangular wooden cargo bed with raised side rails and a flat, solid platform for carrying goods. The structure is supported by two large, spoked wooden wheels mounted on either side, allowing for easy movement. At the front, two long, straight wooden handles extend outward, designed for manual pulling or pushing. The side rails are constructed from horizontal wooden slats, providing containment for items placed inside the cart. The overall finish is a dark, matte wood, giving it a rustic and utilitarian appearance. The cart is robust and functional, suitable for transporting various loads in urban or park environments.
description: A rustic wooden handcart with large spoked wheels, raised side rails, and long front handles for manual transport. The cart has a flat, solid load platform and a dark matte finish.
description_view_0: Side view showing the large spoked wheel, flat cargo bed, and extended front handles.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the open cargo area, side rails, and the width of the platform.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the second wheel visible, showing the symmetry and structure of the cart.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the back rails and the open entry to the cargo bed.
